title: Creamy Australian Pasta Bake
description: A comforting pasta bake with a creamy sauce and a touch of australian flavors.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the roasted vegetables in a little bit of oil until tender.
Add the creamy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, sautéed vegetables, and creamy sauce. Mix well.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheddar cheese.
If using australian bacon, sprinkle it on top of the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
